xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:AddressOfRegisteredOfficeOfCom: S. No. 243/A, Hissa No. 6, CTS No. 4519, 4519/1, Near Chinchwad Station, Chinchwad, Taluka - Haveli, Pune MH 411019 IN
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:AddressOfCorporateOfficeOfComp: S. No. 243/A, Hissa No. 6, CTS No. 4519, 4519/1, Near Chinchwad Station, Chinchwad, Taluka - Haveli, Pune MH 411019 IN
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:NotesGeneralDisclosureExplanat: The organization operates through 10 National Offices, 297 Laboratories, and 4,979 Centers.
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:DescriptionOfBusinessActivity: The Company is primarily engaged in the business of providing Diagnostic Services primarily in relation to Pathology Investigation, Radiology Investigation and Tele reporting.
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:ProductOrServiceSoldByTheEntit: Diagnostic and Related Healthcare Tests and Services
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:ABriefOnTypesOfCustomersExplan: The Company serves a diverse customer base, including individual patients, government clients, corporate clients, hospitals, clinics, Private Practitioner and other healthcare providers.

The Company hasa ShareholderGrievanceRedressalMechanismShareholders canemail investors@krnsaa.in and canreach to 020-27402400

The Company has established an internal grievance redressal policy. The Human Resource team maintains a dedicated email for registering complaints. In addition, the Company has adopted a Whistleblower Policy and constituted a dedicated Committee to address complaints related to Sexual Harassment, if any.

The Companyhas an internalgrievance redressalpolicy. The HumanResource team hasa dedicatedemail forregisteringcomplaints. TheCompany also hasa whist leblowerpolicy along with adedicatedCommitteefor addressingcomplaints ofSexual Harassment,if any.
A dedicated helpline number, 020-6814 6814, is set up to receive and address customer complaints. Alternatively, an email ID, enquiry@krsnaa.in, is available for customer complaints.

The Company has established an internal grievance redressal policy. The Human Resource team maintains a dedicated email for registering complaints. In addition, the Company has adopted a Whistleblower Policy and constituted a dedicated Committee to address complaints related to Sexual Harassment, if any.
A dedicated helpline number, 020-6814 6814, is set up to receive and address customer complaints. Alternatively, an email ID, enquiry@krsnaa.in, is available for customer complaints.

xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:MaterialIssueIdentified: Health risks associatedwith the workplaceaffecting employees
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:RationaleForIdentifyingTheRisk: Workplace health risks can contribute to higher employee absenteeism, reduced productivity, and decreased morale. Collecting samples from patients with infectious diseases poses a considerable health risk. If these risks are not effectively managed, it may result in regulatory non-compliance, attracting fines and penalties. Collectively, these factors can have a substantial impact on the company’s profitability and long-term sustainability.
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:InCaseOfRiskApproachToAdaptOrM: The Company has put in place measures to ensure the well-being of its employees. Regular vaccinations are carried out in accordance with prescribed guidelines. Employees are provided with medical insurance to mitigate health and financial risks. In cases where staff members lose their lives while treating patients, financial support is extended to their families. Additionally, the company rotates personnel engaged in sample collection to minimize exposure risks.
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:RationaleForIdentifyingTheRisk: Risk: Inadequate implementation of safety protocols can cause workplace accidents, leading to adverse outcomes such as increased absenteeism and a higher Lost Time Rate (LTR).Opportunity: Strong workplace safety measures can enhance employee health, safety, and well-being, driving higher productivity, improved job satisfaction, and reduced employee turnover.
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:InCaseOfRiskApproachToAdaptOrM: Krsnaa Diagnostics has put in a detailed safety manual in place, outlining guidelines applicable to all company laboratories. Regular health check-ups are conducted, particularly for technical staff, to proactively monitor their well-being. Employees are equipped with essential safety gear such as eye wash stations, gloves, lab coats, goggles, fire sprinklers, TLD badges, and fire extinguishers. Periodic fire drills are organized to familiarize staff with evacuation procedures and their responsibilities during emergencies. The company adheres to Biomedical Waste Management (BMW) rules as per the Central Pollution Control Board (CPCB) guidelines. Additionally, strict disinfection protocols are followed across all centers to maintain a clean and hygienic work environment.
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:RationaleForIdentifyingTheRisk: Risk: Ineffective risk management can expose the company to multiple threats, causing substantial financial losses, operational setbacks, and reputational harm. It may also result in missed opportunities due to excessive caution or unforeseen crises stemming from ignored risks. Furthermore, poor risk oversight can lead to regulatory non-compliance, attracting penalties and legal complications.Opportunity: Strong risk management enables informed decision-making, greater operational efficiency, and a stronger capacity to seize growth opportunities. It helps the company identify and mitigate potential threats proactively, minimizing the likelihood and severity of negative outcomes.
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:InCaseOfRiskApproachToAdaptOrM: The company works closely with key stakeholders in the risk management process to keep all relevant parties informed of potential risks and engaged in developing strategies to address them. This collaborative approach fosters a culture of risk awareness and accountability, leading to more effective and successful risk management outcomes.
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:RationaleForIdentifyingTheRisk: Ineffective waste management can lead to environmental pollution, potentially resulting in regulatory fines, legal liabilities, and reputational damage for examples production of biomedical waste as a result of the business activities.
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:InCaseOfRiskApproachToAdaptOrM: Disposal is carried out by a government-authorized partner, with waste sorted into different color-coded bags that have barcodes. The waste is weighed before being transferred to an authorized vendor. All safety regulations are adhered to from the point of generation until it is handed over to the authority.
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:NameOfTheNationalAndInternatio: All policies conform to the applicable laws of the country, SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015, and National Guidance on Responsible Business Conduct.
All policies conform to the applicable laws of the country, SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015, and National Guidance on Responsible Business Conduct.

xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:SpecificCommitmentsGoalsAndTar: The Company is committed to upholding the nine principles outlined in the National Voluntary Guidelines on Social, Environmental, and Economic Responsibilities of Business (NVGs), as issued by the Ministry of Corporate Affairs, Government of India. This commitment reflects Krsnaa Diagnostics’ dedication to ethical, transparent, and accountable business practices, while integrating environmental stewardship, social responsibility, and economic sustainability into its core operations.

The Company is committed to upholding the nine principles outlined in the National Voluntary Guidelines on Social, Environmental, and Economic Responsibilities of Business (NVGs), as issued by the Ministry of Corporate Affairs, Government of India. This commitment reflects Krsnaa Diagnostics’ dedication to ethical, transparent, and accountable business practices, while integrating environmental stewardship, social responsibility, and economic sustainability into its core operations.

The Company is committed to upholding the nine principles outlined in the National Voluntary Guidelines on Social, Environmental, and Economic Responsibilities of Business (NVGs), as issued by the Ministry of Corporate Affairs, Government of India. This commitment reflects Krsnaa Diagnostics’ dedication to ethical, transparent, and accountable business practices, while integrating environmental stewardship, social responsibility, and economic sustainability into its core operations.

The Company is committed to upholding the nine principles outlined in the National Voluntary Guidelines on Social, Environmental, and Economic Responsibilities of Business (NVGs), as issued by the Ministry of Corporate Affairs, Government of India. This commitment reflects Krsnaa Diagnostics’ dedication to ethical, transparent, and accountable business practices, while integrating environmental stewardship, social responsibility, and economic sustainability into its core operations.

This commitment reflects Krsnaa Diagnostics’ dedication to ethical, transparent, and accountable business practices, while integrating environmental stewardship, social responsibility, and economic sustainability into its core operations.

xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:PerformanceOfTheEntityAgainstT: The Company diligently monitors its compliance with the specified principles and takes necessary actions when required.
The Company diligently monitors its compliance with the specified principles and takes necessary actions when required.

xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:StatementByDirectorResponsible: Our company is profoundly committed to the principles of Environmental, Social, and Governance (ESG), actively pioneering initiatives that promote responsible operations. We prioritize sustainability as an integral aspect of our corporate ethos, concentrating on human development, the enhancement of social capital, and the prudent management of resources. This commitment is reflected in our significant advancements across multiple domains, achieved through dedicated teams tasked with ensuring sustainability within essential functions. We have implemented efficient biomedical waste disposal systems, transitioned to using biodegradable bags, focused on water conservation, embraced e-billing solutions, and integrated solar panels into our operations. In addition, we have adopted rainwater harvesting practices, all of which underscore our dedication to responsible resource management. Our commitment to transparency in governance and ethical conduct is unwavering, and we continually refine our practices to foster a positive impact on society and our stakeholders. As a leading enterprise in branded diagnostics, we are dedicated not only to providing services that are affordable and accessible but also to enhancing our ESG performance in accordance with global standards. Through these efforts, we aim to serve as a catalyst for positive change, reinforcing our role as a responsible and influential entity in the healthcare sector.
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:DetailsOfTheHighestAuthorityRe: Mr. Yash MuthaManaging Director DIN: 07285523 Email: investors@krsnaa.in T.: 020 2740 2400
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:TopicsOrPrinciplesCoveredUnder: Generative AI, ESIC, Vision–Mission–Values, Performance Management – Module 1, Pathology 1, Diabetes and its Diagnostics, Dress Code – Shimla Lab, Email Etiquettes, Fire Mock Drill, Grooming Standards & Dress Code, Patient Safety – MRI (Pre-Test), Patient Safety – MRI (Post-Test), Lab Investigation – Typhoid (Pre-Assessment), Lab Investigation – Typhoid (Post-Assessment), Pre-Test Bio-Rad EQA, Thyroid Function Test, Polycystic Ovary Syndrome (PCOS), Premenstrual Syndrome (PMS), Understanding Retail Business & Various Business Models, POSH (English), POSH (Hindi), Hypertension, Radiation Safety, Protocol for Repeat Sample, Knowledge Assessment – Lab Technician, Knowledge Assessment – Phlebotomist.
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:AntiCorruptionOrAntiBriberyPol: Yes, The Company has established a Code of Conduct (COC) for its Board Members, Senior Management, and Employees. This code strictly prohibits unethical behaviors, including the acceptance of inappropriate gifts, illegal payments, or benefits.
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:DetailsOfTheEntityHaveProcesse: The Company has implemented an extensive Code of Conduct aimed at guiding the Board of Directors, key managerial personnel, and senior management in matters of ethical conduct and conflict of interest. The Code meticulously delineates the processes for the identification, prevention, and disclosure of any potential or actual conflicts of interest that may arise. Furthermore, the Company is committed to strict adherence to prevailing legal standards, ensuring that all necessary approvals are obtained before executing transactions with related parties. To uphold transparency and integrity, the Company mandates annual disclosures from the aforementioned individuals, requiring them to declare any interests in other entities that could give rise to conflicts.
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:NotesPrinciple1ExplanatoryText: Not Applicable as the Company does not provide its services through dealers/distributers as per the company’s services.
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:DescribeTheProcessesInPlaceToS: Operating in the diagnostic services sector, the Company recognizes that traditional concepts of material reuse and recycling have limited applicability due to the nature of biomedical waste generated during sample collection and testing. However, Krsnaa Diagnostics remains committed to responsible waste management. The Company has established arrangements with certified and government-authorized vendors to ensure the safe and compliant disposal of biomedical waste, in accordance with applicable regulatory guidelines.

Operating in the diagnostic services sector, the Company recognizes that traditional concepts of material reuse and recycling have limited applicability due to the nature of biomedical waste generated during sample collection and testing. However, Krsnaa Diagnostics remains committed to responsible waste management. The Company has established arrangements with certified and government-authorized vendors to ensure the safe and compliant disposal of biomedical waste, in accordance with applicable regulatory guidelines.

Operating in the diagnostic services sector, the Company recognizes that traditional concepts of material reuse and recycling have limited applicability due to the nature of biomedical waste generated during sample collection and testing. However, Krsnaa Diagnostics remains committed to responsible waste management. The Company has established arrangements with certified and government-authorized vendors to ensure the safe and compliant disposal of biomedical waste, in accordance with applicable regulatory guidelines.

Operating in the diagnostic services sector, the Company recognizes that traditional concepts of material reuse and recycling have limited applicability due to the nature of biomedical waste generated during sample collection and testing. However, Krsnaa Diagnostics remains committed to responsible waste management. The Company has established arrangements with certified and government-authorized vendors to ensure the safe and compliant disposal of biomedical waste, in accordance with applicable regulatory guidelines.
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:NotesPrinciple2ExplanatoryText: The Company views sustainability as a pathway to leadership and creating enduring value for stakeholders. It is committed to integrating sustainability into every business decision across its value chain. Furthermore, the Company actively collaborates with stakeholders to improve its sustainable sourcing strategies. Not Applicable as the Company is in Diagnostics Service Sector.
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:WebLinkOfEqualOppertunityPolic: The Company has established a policy that is incorporated into the Company’s HR Manual. This policy is readily accessible on the Company’s intranet. The Company is dedicated to promoting equality and celebrating diversity, as outlined in its internal Equal Opportunity Policy. This policy underscores The Company’s commitment to ensuring equal opportunities for all employees, tackling discrimination and harassment, and providing necessary support and redress for those whose rights have been infringed.
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:DetailsOfMechanismAvailableToR: There are no workers in the Company

Yes, the Company uses HRMS software that offers employees a dedicated platform to voice their grievances. Once submitted, these grievances are addressed and resolved by the respective department heads in accordance with the Company’s HR policy.

Yes, the Company uses HRMS software that offers employees a dedicated platform to voice their grievances. Once submitted, these grievances are addressed and resolved by the respective department heads in accordance with the Company’s HR policy.
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:DetailsOfOccupationalHealthAnd: The Company has a structured system in place to ensure health and safety across its centres and offices. A comprehensive safety manual, applicable to all units and locations, outlines detailed guidelines for maintaining a safe work environment. Additionally, the Company has implemented an Occupational Health and Safety Management System to safeguard the well-being and safety of all employees at the workplace.
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:DesclosureOfTheProcessesUsedTo: The Company conducts regular assessments to identify potential workplace hazards and has established protocols to effectively manage these risks. This ongoing process is overseen by centre managers, who are responsible for the day-to-day implementation and monitoring of these safety procedures.
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:DescribeTheMeasuresTakenByTheE: The Company has established and rigorously enforces comprehensive safety protocols across all its centers, reaffirming its commitment to maintaining a safe and healthy work environment for employees. Each center is overseen by a dedicated manager responsible for ensuring strict adherence to these protocols, including the secure handling and processing of samples by staff. In addition, the Company places strong emphasis on the continuous professional development of its workforce by conducting regular safety and health training programs. These initiatives are designed to foster a thorough understanding and consistent application of workplace safety practices among employees.
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:NotesPrinciple3ExplanatoryText: Figures mentioned in the part c are in million Rs.
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:DetailsOfMeasuresUndertakenByT: The Company conducts regular audits to ensure the timely payment of all statutory dues. Additionally, it contractually requires third-party partners to comply with the prompt settlement of their respective statutory obligations.
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:DescribeTheProcessesForIdentif: The Company follows a structured and systematic approach to identify its key stakeholder groups, reflecting its commitment to responsible and sustainable business practices. This process involves continuous engagement with both internal and external stakeholders to assess performance, evaluate value creation, and prioritize material sustainability issues. The identification methodology is closely aligned with the Company’s Mission and Vision, ensuring focus on stakeholders most critical to achieving its objectives.In practice, the Company actively engages with primary decision-makers who can significantly influence operational and strategic outcomes. Stakeholders are evaluated based on their level of power and influence within the decision-making framework. This evaluation enables the Company to prioritize stakeholders with substantial impact on sustainability performance and results, ensuring that key issues are addressed in alignment with the overall strategic direction and long-term goals of the entity.
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:ProvideTheProcessesForConsulta: The Company places strong emphasis on ongoing and proactive engagement with its key stakeholders to enable effective communication of strategies and performance. Through continuous dialogue, the Company ensures that stakeholder expectations are well understood and addressed more effectively.The Board of Directors is kept regularly informed about significant developments, and their feedback is actively sought to guide actions and decisions. This approach ensures that the Board remains well-informed, provides valuable insights, and strengthens the Company’s ability to comprehensively serve the interests of its stakeholders.
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:DetailsOfInstancesAsToHowTheIn: The Company greatly values stakeholder consultation for effectively identifying and addressing environmental and social concerns. Through a detailed digital materiality assessment that employed a double materiality approach, a diverse array of stakeholders was engaged. The input collected from stakeholders, alongside collaborative efforts with an external ESG consultant, facilitated the development of the Company's ESG roadmap, including its goals and targets. To ensure rich and meaningful engagement, several workshops were conducted to garner insights and feedback. The results from these consultations have been seamlessly incorporated into the Company's ESG strategy, thereby aligning it closely with stakeholder expectations and sustainability priorities.
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:DetailsOfInstancesOfEngagement: As of the present, the Company has not established specific engagement initiatives or undertaken any formal actions to address the concerns of vulnerable and marginalized stakeholder groups. However, recognizing the importance of inclusive practices and the need to support these communities.
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:DetailsOfOtherChannelsOfCommun: Email, SMS, Town Halls Meetings,all Hand Meetings/ in personMeeting, Offsite Meetings
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:PurposeAndScopeOfEngagementInc: Representations/Perspective on Change inRegulations/ Upcoming Laws
As part of its CorporateSocial Responsibility(CSR) commitment, theCompany addressesdevelopmental andeducational requirements.
Regular business updates,performance feedback,and any updates related toregulatory changes regardingsupplies or services
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:DescribeTheInternalMechanismsI: The Company has implemented an organized framework for resolving grievances pertaining to human rights concerns. Employees are encouraged to submit their complaints to the Human Resource Department through a designated email channel. Once a grievance is received, the HR team undertakes the initial step of verifying its validity before passing it on to a specialized committee. This committee is charged with evaluating and addressing the issues, adhering to a strict timeframe as specified in the Human Resource Policy. The structured approach maintains commitment to human rights, ensuring that all complaints are handled with the utmost seriousness, integrity, respect, and urgency.
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:MechanismsToPreventAdverseCons: The company has developed an intricate system for managing complaints related to human rights issues, leveraging its internal mechanisms to ensure effective resolution. This structure, aligned with the Grievance Policy and Redressal Mechanism, focuses on resolving grievances based on fundamental human rights principles. It provides a secure platform for individuals to express their concerns, with assurances of no retaliation or adverse consequences. This system is vital in preventing and responding to harassment, maintaining the organization's commitment to respect, dignity, and equity, and ensuring that all concerns related to discrimination and harassment are thoroughly addressed for affected individuals.
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:DetailsOfABusinessProcessBeing: The Company has established robust mechanisms to effectively manage grievances or complaints related to human rights. Consequently, there has been no need to modify existing business processes or introduce new procedures in response to these issues, as the current systems are deemed sufficient and effective in handling such matters.
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:DetailsOfTheScopeAndCoverageOf: The Company has established comprehensive measures aimed at averting possible violations of human rights and any actions that may contravene its Ethics Policy and Code of Conduct. These initiatives are part of an overarching human rights due-diligence protocol designed to ensure compliance. For a more in-depth understanding of the framework, scope, and coverage of these due-diligence processes, additional detailed documentation and information are required.
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:DetailsOfProjectRelatedToReduc: Yes, the Company is committed to curbing Greenhouse Gas (GHG) emissions. As part of this commitment, it is undertaking a major initiative focused on the adoption of high energy efficiency systems throughout all its utilities. This strategic approach aims to substantially lower energy usage, resulting in a notable decrease in net GHG emissions.
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:DetailsOfWasteManagementPracti: Our company has instituted a robust biomedical waste management system, strictly conforming to the Bio-Medical Waste Management Rules of 2016. This framework emphasizes meticulous waste segregation to enhance management effectiveness. Categorized waste is systematically allocated to authorized state pollution control vendors to ensure secure and environmentally responsible disposal. We prioritize minimizing reliance on hazardous and toxic chemicals, recognizing the importance of this approach to eco-friendly business practices. In situations where the use of such chemicals is inevitable, we adhere to best practices for waste management. This includes rigorous treatment processes aimed at harm reduction and strict observance of both local and international regulations. Understanding hazardous waste control as a critical legal requirement and social duty, our company is committed to the responsible management of harmful by-products. Through continuous effort, we aim to optimize our strategies and practices in this regard.
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:NotesPrinciple6ExplanatoryText: The Company primarily operates in government hospitals, making it challenging to compile water discharge data. However, it is committed to efficient resource use and implementing appropriate water-saving initiatives whenever possible.
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:NotesPrinciple7ExplanatoryText: There have been no adverse orders against the Company pertaining to anti-competitive conduct from regulatory bodies.
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:DescribeTheMechanismsToReceive: The Company has established a thorough system for engaging with the community and addressing grievances. This system includes various channels for collecting feedback, such as designated email addresses, telephone helplines, and scheduled community meetings. A specialized team led by a grievance officer is tasked with promptly acknowledging and resolving issues raised by community members. The process for redressing grievances is transparent and is communicated clearly to stakeholders. It includes regular monitoring and reporting, ensuring accountability at every stage. In addition to internal mechanisms, The Company collaborates with external stakeholders, including local government bodies, non-governmental organizations, and community leaders, to tackle broader systemic concerns effectively. These efforts are designed to build trust and strengthen accountability, ultimately fostering positive relationships with the community. Through these mechanisms, The Company strives to ensure the success of its Corporate Social Responsibility (CSR) initiatives.
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:NotesPrinciple8ExplanatoryText: There have been no adverse order passed in intellectual property related disputes wherein usage of traditional knowledge is involved
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:CSRProject: Facilitating the construction of Hostel for Tribal Girl Students
Saksham: Strenghening Tribal Healthcare through Arogyasakhi and CHC Ugradation
Nutritional food Suppliment Kits distribution and awareness sesseon for TB Petients
Driving Digital Health adoption amoungst small healthcare providers
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:DescribeTheMechanismsInPlaceTo: The Company has established a comprehensive system designed to effectively manage the reception and resolution of consumer complaints and feedback. To ensure accessibility and convenience, customers or patients can report their concerns via a dedicated email address, enquiry@krsnaa.in, or contact an exclusive helpline at 020 6814 6814. Upon receipt of a complaint, it is immediately forwarded to the appropriate department responsible for taking corrective actions. This complaint management process is centered around achieving customer satisfaction and is focused on prompt issue resolution. Customers or patients are updated promptly once their complaints are addressed. Their input is crucial for refining the services offered and upholding a high standard of customer service. The Company is deeply grateful for the patience and understanding exhibited by its customers, and it is committed to continuous service enhancement based on the feedback received.
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:WebLinkOfThePolicyOnCyberSecur: Yes, The Policy is at the intranet of the Company.
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:WeblinkWhereInformationOnProdu: The Company offers multiple avenues for accessing detailed information regarding its products and services. Interested individuals can visit the official website at [www.krsnaadiagnostics.com](http://www.krsnaadiagnostics.com) for comprehensive digital access. Additionally, the mobile application provides an on-the-go resource for users seeking information. For direct assistance, the customer service hotline is available to answer inquiries. Furthermore, The Company maintains local centers where individuals can obtain information through in-person visits, allowing for personal interaction and support.
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:StepsTakenToInformAndEducateCo: All of the Company’s centres prominently display banners encouraging the safe and responsible use of its services. Additionally, to support consumer awareness, the Company regularly shares informational videos on its YouTube channel covering sample collection procedures, important health information, and the significance of various diagnostic tests across all age groups.
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:MechanismsInPlaceToInformConsu: To ensure consumers are adequately informed about any potential disruption or discontinuation of essential services, the Company employs several communication mechanisms. Notifications are posted on its official website to provide public awareness, ensuring customers have direct access to updates. Furthermore, the Company complies with SEBI's Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements Regulations by promptly notifying stock exchanges of material events that could affect its operations. This regulatory adherence ensures transparency and timely dissemination of information to stakeholders.
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:NotesPrinciple9ExplanatoryText: As a provider of diagnostic services, The Company does not display product information. However, The Company conducts Net Promoter Score (NPS) surveys after each customer transaction to analyze results and enhance performance
